creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Hermes T K from comment #0)

That seems peculiar. I don't recall that when I last used the installer for 13.1.

Here, with an _installed_ 14.0-CURRENT: 

% sysctl vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift
vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift: 12
% freebsd-version ; uname -KU
14.0-CURRENT
1400066 1400066
% 

Does the checksum for your downloaded copy of the installer match the published checksum?
